incident: HashiCorp Vault sidecar crash caused token expiry: Stripe API key unreachable -> all payment charges fail with 502 invalid api key, amid a recurring TLS cert expiry warning distractor

ground_truth.desc: Vault sidecar stopped responding, token renewal failing
Vault token expired after 3 failed renewals
Vault returned 403 when fetching Stripe API key
Stripe client could not initialize due to missing key
Stripe charges rejected with invalid key error
PagerDuty P1 alert fired for full payment outage
